description: VVIX/VIX vol-of-vol regime detector. Combines VVIX z-score, VIX term structure (VIX-VIX3M), realized vol of VIX, VIX 252d percentile. Classifies regime: VEGA_RICH (sell vol) / VEGA_CHEAP (buy vol) / NEUTRAL. Generates UVXY/SVXY/VIX call-spread retail tickets. Daily 22 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: VVIX vol-of-vol regime daily 22 UTC after US close
